ru.curs.celesta.score.io

Class UrlResource

  • java.lang.Object
    • ru.curs.celesta.score.io.UrlResource
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Resource

    public final class UrlResource
extends Object
implements Resource
    Score resource located in a JAR-file.
    Since:
    2019-02-23
    Author:
    Pavel Perminov (packpaul@mail.ru)
